column1: # AGGREGATE(function_num, options, ref1, ...) — T2 subset (spec §7/§11 T2).
# function_num 1-11 selects the inner aggregate; options 0/4 = ignore nothing,
# 6 = ignore error values. function_num 12-19 and the hidden-row options
# (1/2/3/5/7) are deferred in T2 -> #VALUE! (ruling in families/t2misc.rs).
